{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035459D77D500C19F9B4C5BC6E"}"},"total":3883},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7375405228157551384","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别特别好看！！！番茄看了三百多个小时书，我第一本充钱打赏的文，谁懂这个含金量。然后首先主角很强，不是那种很憋屈的猥琐发育流，男主帅得一匹，有系统，但是系统行是因为我们男主行，立的起来，我看小说的慕强癖真的是得到了满足！其次作为第四天灾文，玩家的自主性很高，不是全依靠男主给的任务而去完成任务，玩家里面有很多有脑子的！会自己的逻辑和思考方式，不是那种只会阿巴阿巴的工具人，直接节目效果拉满，因为很多选择我真的是想都想不到哈哈哈很好玩的，比如说遇到强敌，主角问玩家中的指挥官，你觉得我应该怎么做？——我建议你投降","text_exts":[{"e":118,"s":114,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774209299B4C5BC6E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227375405228157551384%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227345353652141313048%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717223384,"group_id":"7345353652141313048","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/fBwCNT3M8CtknSo2meD3U=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"594211168595752","user_name":"喜欢赛牡丹的李导"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"594211168595752","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345353652141313048","book_info":{"abstract":"星际联盟时代，无数种族联合在一起对抗虫族入侵。
　　万族之中，人族势力最弱。
　　身为唯一进入领主学院的人类，他被分配到了一个偏远荒蛮的星球。
　　这里危机四伏，随时都有可能被虫族发现吞噬。
　　不能发展出自己的族群和星球，卫源不仅不能毕业，还有可能会死。
　　好在穿越必备系统，卫源反手召唤老乡。
　　那就给星际万族亿点点第四天灾的震撼吧。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0c3c2b675f051f688f7dc1c5264e737c","author":"一平平","author_id":"","book_id":"7345353652141313048","book_name":"我召唤的族人，怎么全是乐子人？","book_short_name":"在星际做天灾","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7345353705576727064","read_count":"55907","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1358318"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"604","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,星际,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6ea47fdb34d874877bf8341ed2f4095c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393299&x-signature=8pfAji6NfMz20VBDbr4g0bkuSXM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"77083116396","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"145"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035459D77D500C19F9B4C5BC6E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23321,"reply_count":10,"show_pv":39827},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1717245854,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7379637420803326782","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我也曾看过不少的男频文，说实话大部分男频文作为一个女读者真的很难看下去，这篇文算是男频文中的一股清流了，不管是剧情还是人物 ，包括一些遣词造句都是很难得的干净，没有对女性身体部位的特写，也没有用一些很那啥的词语，更没有设置一些骚剧情，读起来令人心情愉快，加上作者文笔流畅，故事犹如画卷一般徐徐展开，看得很过瘾，不够看，多更点吧大大。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718208945,"group_id":"7345353652141313048","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"受命于天","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N28C878cyVKnZhRFv5HKKek9aAY7Ghtj4wpy1KU0RVe2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/77d540df82d2469089ef3e4c5d75c6f2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795338&x-signature=LEHEwf1CvhT%2FBgwmnfA27WyDOeE%3D","user_id":"2714038714506920","user_name":"没人能拒绝我秦霸天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2714038714506920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1800963551,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345353652141313048","book_info":{"abstract":"星际联盟时代，无数种族联合在一起对抗虫族入侵。
